description_long: This hammer features a robust, yellow metallic head with a classic claw design, ideal for both driving and removing nails. The head is smoothly contoured, with one side forming a flat striking face and the other curving into a split claw for prying. The handle is a vibrant blue, ergonomically shaped with finger grooves for a secure grip, and appears to be made of a durable, possibly rubberized or plastic material. The handle is slightly curved, enhancing comfort and control during use. The overall construction suggests a tool designed for both efficiency and user comfort, suitable for a variety of urban repair or construction tasks. The surface of the hammer is clean and free from visible wear, indicating it is either new or very well maintained.
description: A yellow claw hammer with a blue ergonomic, grooved handle, designed for comfort and effective nail driving and removal. The tool appears clean and well-crafted, with no visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the yellow claw head and the blue ergonomic handle with finger grooves.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow face of the hammer head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the claw head and the blue handle's curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the hammer head and the end of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Blue rubberized ergonomic grip handle with finger grooves and a slight curve for comfort.
attribute_head_type: Yellow steel claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved, split claw for nail removal.
